review: Always enjoy the menu items. staff are always great! Keep it all going. Thank you.
will change store location at some point in ordering process and if you don't catch it you have to go to a location you don't want and you can't cancel the order in the app to get a refund

app is awful. you type your address in and it still doesn't show u "deals in your area" because it wants you to turn location services on. lol. had point on app, redeemed, then didn't place the order and so DIDNT use the points and the points disappeared. awful and glitchy. doesn't let you use certain cards. so I just don't use this app.

It's funny. A company bragging about having billions of customers. Yet their app doesn't work at all. Hangs on both android and IOS. One would think with the money a company like McDonald's makes that they would pay someone to fix this. Points expire if unused for a period of time.
